title: Dispensing device for micro-tablets
abstract: The present disclosure is directed to storage and dispensing devices for micro-tablets. The devices of the disclosure comprise a cover, a base, a spring, a reservoir, an indexing plate, a dosing plate, an adaptor, and an overcap.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A device for storing and dispensing to a patient a specific number of micro-tablets, said device comprising a) a cover, comprising a claw seal and a plug; b) a base, comprising a shaft; c) a spring; d) a reservoir; e) an indexing plate, comprising a disc portion that comprises a slot and a solid web, numbers along the circumference of the disc portion, and teeth; f) a dosing plate, comprising a disc portion having a set number of openings that correspond to the numbers located on the indexing plate, teeth, and a number of protrusions; g) an adaptor, comprising a disc portion having a slot and a solid web, threads and a display window that displays a number located on the indexing plate; and h) an overcap, comprising threads, which engage the threads of the adaptor, and vertical slots, which engage the protrusions of the dosing plate. 2. The device of claim 1, wherein the dosing plate incorporates from 1 to 50 openings into which individual micro-tablets may be loaded, and corresponding numbers from 1 to 50 along a circumference of the indexing plate. 3. The device of claim 2, wherein the dosing plate incorporates from 1 to 30 openings into which the individual micro-tablets may be loaded, and corresponding numbers from 1 to 30 along a circumference of the indexing plate. 4. The device of claim 3, wherein the dosing plate incorporates from 1 to 20 openings into which the individual micro-tablets may be loaded, and corresponding numbers from 1 to 20 along a circumference of the indexing plate. 5. The device according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein a number on the circumference of the indexing plate is displayed through the display window on the adapter. 6. The device according to claim 5, wherein the number corresponds to the number of openings into which single micro-tablets may be seated. 7. The device according to claim 1 , wherein the teeth on the indexing plate are engaged with the teeth of the dosing plate. 8. The device according to claim 1 , wherein the teeth on the indexing plate are disengaged from the teeth of the dosing plate.
